cases.parties: Azad Engineering vs. Hamuel (counterparty; nature not disclosed in sources reviewed)
cases.note: Confirmed but unquantified. The company's own investor presentation footnotes 'professional and consultancy charges towards Hamuel litigation' as a non-recurring Adjusted EBITDA add-back — confirming a litigation matter exists (case reference: 'Hamuel'), but no forum, contingent-liability amount, or current status was found in the sources reviewed for this report.
cases.source: Investor Presentation, May 2026 (Adjusted EBITDA bridge footnote); referenced in FY21 non-recurring expense adjustments
